mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.avatar, u.nickname, a.id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.views, a.likes, a.collects FROM t_article a INNER JOIN `t_user` u ON a.user_id = u.id
INNER JOIN t_article_tag atg ON a.id = atg.article_id AND atg.tag_id = #{tagId}
WHERE a.is_published = 1 AND a.audit_status = 1 AND u.status = 1
ORDER BY a.sort DESC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id AS article_id, a.title, a.content, a.create_time, a.views, a.likes, a.collects,
-- 作者信息 u.id AS author_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.personal_intro, u.role,
-- 作者统计数据 us.total_articles, us.total_likes, us.total_collects, us.follower_count,
-- 标签信息 t.id AS tag_id, t.name AS tag_name,
-- 当前用户是否点赞（未登录或未点赞返回0） CASE WHEN alc_like.id IS NOT NULL AND alc_like.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked,
-- 当前用户是否收藏（未登录或未收藏返回0） CASE WHEN alc_collect.id IS NOT NULL AND alc_collect.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_collected,
-- 当前用户是否关注作者（未登录或未关注返回0） CASE WHEN uf.id IS NOT NULL AND uf.is_cancel = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_followed
FROM t_article a
-- 关联作者信息 INNER JOIN `t_user` u ON a.user_id = u.id
-- 关联作者统计信息 LEFT JOIN t_user_stat us ON u.id = us.user_id
-- 关联标签信息 LEFT JOIN t_article_tag atg ON a.id = atg.article_id LEFT JOIN t_tag t ON atg.tag_id = t.id
-- 查询当前用户是否点赞该文章 LEFT JOIN t_article_like_collect alc_like ON a.id = alc_like.article_id AND alc_like.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND alc_like.msg_type = 1 AND alc_like.is_cancel = 0
-- 查询当前用户是否收藏该文章 LEFT JOIN t_article_like_collect alc_collect ON a.id = alc_collect.article_id AND alc_collect.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND alc_collect.msg_type = 2 AND alc_collect.is_cancel = 0
-- 查询当前用户是否关注作者 LEFT JOIN t_user_follow uf ON a.user_id = uf.followed_user_id AND uf.user_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.is_cancel = 0
WHERE a.id = #{articleId} AND a.is_published = 1 AND a.audit_status = 1
SELECT id, title FROM t_article WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id != #{excludeArticleId} AND is_published = 1 AND audit_status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT a.id AS articleId, a.title, a.summary, a.create_time AS createTime, a.audit_status AS auditStatus, a.is_published AS isPublished, a.views, a.likes, a.comments, a.collects FROM t_article a WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_article ( id, user_id, title, summary, cover, content, is_published, audit_status, sort, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{content}, #{isPublished}, #{auditStatus}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO t_article_tag ( id, article_id, tag_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.articleId}, #{item.tagId}, NOW(), NOW() )
